reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch and added an Acked-by tag to indicate agreement with the change. The reviewer understood that the patch is intended for hotplug use cases without CONFIG_MEMORY_HOTPLUG.

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch series exports the `mhp_get_default_online_type` function to allow drivers that use DAX and hotplug policies to build even when hotplug is disabled. The function returns `MMOP_OFFLINE` by default, which is non-destructive.
